note: gp-momentum-1.0.0 tunables. The strategy parameters (minPrice, minDollarVol, regimeMa, trendMa, momentumLookback, gapFilterPct, gapFilterWindow, entryRankPct, exitRankPct, atrPeriod, kStop, riskPctPerTrade, targetPositions, maxPositions, positionCapPct, weeklyDdLimit, monthlyDdLimit, maxDdLimit) are the FROZEN, PRE-REGISTERED values from docs/Strategy-v1.md §8 — do NOT fit them to history; any change is a new strategy version re-tested from scratch (Validation-Scorecard). alertMode MUST start 'observe'; only a human flips it to 'live'. OPERATIONAL/COST values are NOT in §8 and are agent-proposed defaults to confirm before --apply: feeBps=0 (commissions ~$0 at modern brokers, §9 'include them'), slippageBps=10 (~0.1%/side, §9), timeoutTradingDays=252 (labeler backstop only — momentum has no time-based exit and 'lets winners run', so this is set long to avoid truncating runners), accountSize=10000 (sizing base, arbitrary in observe mode). This file is NOT auto-applied; writing it to the live gp-config row is a deliberate human step (scripts/seed.mjs --apply), and gp-config is a human-reserved trading row.
